somali.sr_imported: Organizer waa la soo dhoofiyay — hadda ka dhig kaaga
somali.sr_reset: Habaynta dib ayaa loogu celiyay qaabkii asalka
somali.sculpt_engine_failed: Lama soo rari karin sculpting engine-ka.
somali.sculpt_failed: Farshaxanku wuu fashilmay — isku day sharaxaad fudud.
somali.assess_failed: Tababareku kama jawaabi karin — mar kale isku day.
somali.sr_assessed: Jawaabta tababaraha waa diyaar hoosta builder panel-ka
somali.recall_needs_more: Marka hore ku dar ugu yaraan 4 fikradood 2 koox
somali.sr_recall_started: Habka xusuusta: dhammaan fikradaha waxay ku dhaceen tray-ga. Mid kastaba ku celi meeshiisa.
somali.sr_recall_complete: Adigu dib ayaad u dhistay dunidaada oo dhan xusuusta!
somali.print_saved: One-pager waa la soo dejiyay — fur oo daabac
somali.import_replaces: Tani waxay bedeli doontaa composition-kaaga hadda.
somali.title: Foomam Xor ah
somali.tagline: Dhis Dunidaada Foomamka: dooro archetypal structure, ku buuxi ideas-kaaga, ku habee 3D, oo qor waxa muhiimka ah.
somali.tagline2: Halkan adigu waa qoraaga — AI kaliya wax buu ku tilmaamaa, oo kaliya marka aad codsato.
somali.keep_content_hint: Kooxahaaga iyo ideas-kaaga way sii jiraan — dooranta foomku kaliya waxay beddeshaa qaabka meesha.
somali.print_tip: Soo deji one-pager la daabici karo (snapshot + ideas-kaaga + jawaabta tababaraha)
somali.recall_tip: Ideas-kaagu waxay ku dhacaan tray-ga — ka soo celi xusuusta
somali.assess_needs_items: Marka hore ku dar ugu yaraan 3 ideas
somali.assess_tip: Weydii AI coach-ka inuu eego composition-kaaga oo dhan
somali.recall_instructions: Dhammaan ideas-ka waxay ka soo dhaceen meeshoodii oo galeen tray-ga hoose. Dooro idea meesha, ka dibna isticmaal group chips (ama furayaasha [ iyo ]) si aad guriga ugu dirto. Waxba lama keydiyo inta ciyaartu socoto.
somali.recall_complete: dib ayaad u dhistay dunidaada oo dhan!
somali.studio_loading: Waxaa la soo rarayaa shape studio…
somali.no_3d: Halkan lama soo rari karin 3D space — builder panel-kaagu weli wuu shaqeynayaa, wax kastoo aad qorto waa la keydiyaa.
somali.stage_hint: Meesha: jiid idea si aad u dhigto · jiid background si aad u wareejiso · scroll si aad u weyneyso · [ iyo ] waxay u guuriyaan idea-da la doortay kooxaha dhexdooda.
